assertions.description: PaymentRequest is exposed; SPC authentication requests are launched through the Payment Request API.
PaymentResponse is exposed; a successful SPC show() resolves through a PaymentResponse whose details carry the PublicKeyCredential.
PublicKeyCredential remains exposed because SPC signs transaction data with WebAuthn-style credentials.
PaymentRequest.prototype.show is exposed; the browser-owned refreshed SPC UX appears when show() is invoked.
PaymentResponse.prototype.complete is exposed so merchant code can complete the payment after SPC authentication succeeds or fails.
Constructing PaymentRequest with secure-payment-confirmation data, HTTPS payeeOrigin, instrument.details, showOptOut, and paymentEntitiesLogos succeeds.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{if(typeof PaymentRequest==='undefined'||typeof PublicKeyCredential==='undefined')return false;const icon='data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+P+/HgAFhAJ/wlseKgAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==';const logo='data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mP8z8BQDwAFgwJ/l7fOqQAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==';const request=new PaymentRequest([{supportedMethods:'secure-payment-confirmation',data:{rpId:location.hostname,credentialIds:[new Uint8Array([1,2,3,4]).buffer],challenge:new Uint8Array([5,6,7,8]).buffer,instrument:{displayName:'Visa ending 4242',details:'First National Bank',icon,iconMustBeShown:false},payeeOrigin:'https://merchant.example',payeeName:'Demo Merchant',timeout:60000,showOptOut:true,paymentEntitiesLogos:[{label:'First National Bank',url:logo}]}}],{total:{label:'Total',amount:{currency:'USD',value:'99.00'}}});return typeof request.show==='function'&&typeof request.canMakePayment==='function';}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: A valid SPC PaymentRequest exposes canMakePayment(), which resolves to a boolean used to decide whether to offer SPC or a fallback.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{if(typeof PaymentRequest==='undefined'||typeof PublicKeyCredential==='undefined')return false;const icon='data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+P+/HgAFhAJ/wlseKgAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==';const request=new PaymentRequest([{supportedMethods:'secure-payment-confirmation',data:{rpId:location.hostname,credentialIds:[new Uint8Array([1,2,3,4]).buffer],challenge:new Uint8Array([5,6,7,8]).buffer,instrument:{displayName:'Visa ending 4242',details:'First National Bank',icon,iconMustBeShown:false},payeeOrigin:'https://merchant.example',payeeName:'Demo Merchant',timeout:60000,showOptOut:true}}],{total:{label:'Total',amount:{currency:'USD',value:'99.00'}}});const result=await request.canMakePayment();return typeof result==='boolean';}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: SPC PaymentRequest validation rejects a non-HTTPS payeeOrigin before a native dialog is shown.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{if(typeof PaymentRequest==='undefined'||typeof PublicKeyCredential==='undefined')return false;const icon='data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+P+/HgAFhAJ/wlseKgAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==';new PaymentRequest([{supportedMethods:'secure-payment-confirmation',data:{rpId:location.hostname,credentialIds:[new Uint8Array([1,2,3,4]).buffer],challenge:new Uint8Array([5,6,7,8]).buffer,instrument:{displayName:'Visa ending 4242',details:'First National Bank',icon,iconMustBeShown:false},payeeOrigin:'http://merchant.example',payeeName:'Demo Merchant',timeout:60000}}],{total:{label:'Total',amount:{currency:'USD',value:'99.00'}}});return false;}catch(e){return e instanceof TypeError||/payeeOrigin|HTTPS/i.test(String(e.message));}})()

assertions.description: If the experimental securePaymentConfirmationAvailability() static helper is exposed, it is a function.
The UX refresh ships on Android Chrome; if the visitor is on Android, the UA reflects a mobile Android context.
